name: beforedone
description: Require fresh evidence before a coding agent claims completion, then reconstruct failed runs from observable events.

interface.shortDescription: Make coding agents prove they are done
interface.longDescription: BeforeDone uses a local CLI and trusted Codex lifecycle hooks to bind completion claims to fresh evidence and turn observable failed-run events into replayable incident reports. The CLI must already be installed on PATH; install it with `go install github.com/rrrrrredy/beforedone/cmd/beforedone@latest`, then review the hooks with `/hooks`. This plugin never downloads the CLI.
defaultPrompt: Verify this task with BeforeDone before declaring it complete.
Investigate this failed agent run with BeforeDone.
